_instructions: Fill in fields below. Repeatable sections (parents, grandparents, siblings, children, pets) are arrays — add as many entries as needed. Leave empty strings for unknown fields. Load via: lv80PreloadNarrator(template) or lv80PreloadFromFile(file)
_trainerPrompt: Use this trainer to show concise, anchored answers with time, place, and people.

parents.notableLifeEvents: Ran a clothing business in Montreal.

spouse.narrative: Fourth wife. Married in 2001. They share a love of horses and equestrian activities.

children.narrative: Eldest daughter from first marriage to Gloria Rand.

marriage.weddingDetails: Married four times. First to Gloria Rand (1956-1969), then Marcy Lafferty (1973-1996), Nerine Kidd (1997-1999), and Elizabeth Martin (2001-present).

familyTraditions.description: Horseback riding and equestrian events with family.

earlyMemories.firstMemory: Growing up in the Notre-Dame-de-Grace neighborhood of Montreal.
earlyMemories.significantEvent: Attending a summer camp where he developed a love of performing.

education.schooling: West Hill High School in Montreal.
education.higherEducation: Bachelor of Commerce from McGill University (1952).
education.earlyCareer: Began acting at the Canadian National Repertory Theatre in Ottawa. Joined the Stratford Shakespeare Festival.
education.careerProgression: Moved to New York for Broadway. Cast as Captain Kirk in Star Trek (1966). Career spans TV, film, music, and authorship across seven decades.
education.communityInvolvement: Charity work for habitat conservation and veterans organizations.

laterYears.retirement: Has shown no signs of retiring, remaining active in acting, writing, and public appearances well into his 90s.
laterYears.lifeLessons: 'The world is a stage. You've got to get out there and act on it.'

hobbies.personalChallenges: The tragic loss of third wife Nerine Kidd, who drowned in 1999.
hobbies.travel: Traveled extensively for filming and convention appearances worldwide.

health.lifestyleChanges: Active lifestyle centered around horses and outdoor activities.

additionalNotes.unfinishedDreams: Continuing to write, act, and explore. Went to space on Blue Origin at age 90 in October 2021.
additionalNotes.messagesForFutureGenerations: 'Get out there and embrace the unknown.'
